title: State Government Securities - Full Auction Result
description: The result of the auction of State Government Securities held on May 12, 2026, is as under: (Amount in ₹ Crore)   ASSAM SGS 2032* BIHAR SGS 2051 CHHATTISGARH SGS 2031 CHHATTISGARH SGS 2040 Notified Amount 1000 1600 500 500 Tenor Re-issue of 7.22% ASSAM SGS 2032 issued on 18-MAR-2026 Re-issue of 7.92% BIHAR SGS 2051 issued on 15-APR-2026 Re-issue of 7.37% CHHATTISGARH SGS 2031 issued on 15-APR-2026 Re-issue of 7.83% CHHATTISGARH SGS 2040 issued on 15-APR-2026 Competitive Bids Received
